title: Remington Detail Kit for Men (Trimmer for Eyebrows and Fine Detailing, Rotary Trimmer for Nose and Ear, Comb Tweezers, Storage, Battery Operated with Battery Included) NE8000
features: Rotary Trimmer Attachment - The Rotary Trimmer is perfect for safely and gently trimming nose and ear hair.
Linear Trimmer Attachment with Dual Sided Eyebrow Comb - For fine detailing and hair removal in hard-to-reach areas. The Dual Sided Eyebrow Comb (3mm, 6mm) can trim and neaten up your eyebrow hair.
Compact Storage Solution - The Tweezers and Eyebrow Comb are both conveniently stored inside of the trimmer’s handle to keep your look tidy and neat.
Battery Operated (1xAA included) - Instant and continuous power.
2 Year Manufacturer's Guarantee - Plus 1 extra year when you register the product online within 28 days.
description: Product Description Keep your facial hairs in check with the Remington Trim & Fit detail kit. It has everything you need to tidy and shape you look in the palm of your hand - all the attachments are neatly stored in the trimmer’s handle. The Linear Trimmer is ideal for eyebrow trimming and fine detailing in hard-to-reach areas. A Rotary Trimmer tackles unwanted nose and ear hair while the handy tweezers get to grips with pesky strays. With so many ways to keep on top of your style, the Trim & Fit is your all-in-one tool for sharpening your style. Directions [INF] 1. Install the included battery. 2. Use the Rotary Trimmer Attachment for trimming nose and ear hair. 3. Use the Linear Trimmer Attachment with Dual Sided Eyebrow Comb for fine detailing and hair removal in hard-to-reach areas, and adjust eyebrow hair length using the 3mm and 6mm comb settings. 4. Store the Tweezers and Eyebrow Comb inside the trimmer’s handle for convenience. Safety Warning Keep away from water. Do not use on broken or irritated skin. Stop using if irritation occurs. The product is intended for use on ears and nose and is dangerous when used on other parts of the body. See more
